ip_outcome_note: Card name, Pokedex number (511), and all visual descriptors match the canonical Pansage entry. The depicted figure is unambiguously the named Pokemon character — this is a standard named-Pokemon card, not an unnamed generic figure.

trivia_bullets.text: Black Bolt (set code ZSV10pt5) is part of Scarlet & Violet SV10.5, released July 18, 2025 — the first-ever dual TCG set in English Pokemon history, paired with White Flare. The set is a full Unova region retrospective: every Generation V Pokemon receives an Illustration Rare card, making Pansage one of 86 printed-total cards in an overall master set exceeding 1,100 cards. [PokemonTCG.io API: zsv10pt5-4] [tcg.pokemon.com: Black Bolt expansion overview]

Pansage is National Pokedex no. 511, introduced in Generation V (Black & White, 2010). It is one of three elemental monkey Pokemon (Pansage/Grass, Pansear/Fire, Panpour/Water) designed around the concept of the three wise monkeys — see no evil, hear no evil, speak no evil — and also to function as early-game type-advantage aids keyed to Unova's first gym, which features three different leaders specializing in Grass, Fire, and Water. [Serebii.net Pokedex: 511] [WebSearch via GamesRadar]
Flavor text on this printing: "This Pokemon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic." [PokemonTCG.io API: zsv10pt5-4]

Art by kurumitsu. The card's oracle text offers Collect (draw a card) and Scratch (30 damage) — both entry-level moves consistent with Pansage's role as a common support starter. Regulation mark I places it in current Standard format legal rotation as of its July 2025 release. [PokemonTCG.io API: zsv10pt5-4]
